dialogueChunks.intro: You're back! But... your face tells me something went wrong out there.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type} have set up a camp right along the path to where the {quest_item} grows. They weren't there before, I swear it. {target_npc} says they've been moving closer to {location} all week. You'll need to clear them out or find another way through.
dialogueChunks.outro: I'm so sorry to pile more trouble on you. We're counting on you more than ever now.

playerResponses.text: A few monsters won't stop me. I'll push through.
This just got harder. I'll need something extra for my trouble.
This is getting too dangerous. I'm done.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I... I don't know how to say this. Something terrible has happened while you were away.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} took what little {quest_item} we had stockpiled and fled toward {location_hint}. Said they couldn't wait any longer and were going to trade it for safe passage out of the region. Without those supplies, everything you've gathered so far won't be enough. We need you to track them down and recover what they took.
dialogueChunks.outro: I trusted them. We all did. Please, bring back what's ours before it's too late.

playerResponses.text: I'll find them. They couldn't have gotten far.
Chasing down your own people now? This keeps getting worse.
Sort out your own problems. I've done enough.

dialogueChunks.intro: Oh no. No, no, no. {player_name}, we have a new problem.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_item} you found? It's not enough. The blight has spread faster than we thought, and now we need three times the amount. Worse, the only place to find more is deep in {enemy_type} territory {location_hint}. I've heard there's a cave system where it grows thick on the walls, but nobody who's gone in has come back out.
dialogueChunks.outro: I would never ask this if there were any other option. You're the only hope {location} has left.

playerResponses.text: Then I'll go deeper. Show me where this cave is.
Every time I come back you need more. This is the last time.
I've risked my neck enough already.
